steps.title: Separate complete clauses
steps.content: The words before the blank form one complete sentence about Kelley joining Indigenous women in North American cinema. The words after the blank form another complete sentence about her film. A period can separate those independent clauses.

steps.title: Reject fused clauses
steps.content: Choice A creates a comma splice. Choice C incorrectly folds her film into the first clause instead of starting a new sentence. Choice D leaves the complete clauses with no punctuation boundary. The answer is B.
